# Agents

## semantic_agent

* Uses embeddings to detect semantic similarity
* Detects paraphrased plagiarism

## web_search_agent

* Searches web sources for matching content
* Returns matched URLs and similarity scores

## academic_agent

* Compares text with academic corpus
* Identifies research paper overlap

## ai_detection_agent

* Detects if content is AI-generated
* Uses multiple detection strategies

## aggregation_agent

* Combines outputs from all agents
* Produces final plagiarism score

## report_agent

* Generates final structured report
* Adds explanation and highlights
